global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with a clear focus on savings and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Last-minute savings' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline states 'Special fares today', providing additional context.

elements.label: Shop now
elements.description: A bright yellow button with rounded edges that says 'Shop now' is positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Special fares today €29.99 Shop now

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A small logo labeled 'WayPoint' appears at the top left corner of the ad, in a simple font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting text.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label that reads 'UGC' is positioned near the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, last-minute savings, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, Special fares today, €29.99, Shop now, WayPoint, SALE, UGC
